Class HW2CrudValidationTest

java.lang.Object
applicationMain.HW2CrudValidationTest
public class HW2CrudValidationTest extends Object
Semi-automated validation test suite for TP2 student post and reply workflows.

Purpose (Task 6): provide executable evidence that CRUD and validation behaviors satisfy the intent of Students User Stories.

Requirement list covered in this class:

  1. R1: Create post succeeds for valid input.
  2. R2: Create post rejects duplicate IDs.
  3. R3: Create post rejects invalid title input.
  4. R4: Read post by id returns existing post.
  5. R5: Update post succeeds for valid target and data.
  6. R6: Update post rejects missing target.
  7. R7: Delete post succeeds for existing target.
  8. R8: Delete post reports false for missing target.
  9. R9: Create reply succeeds when post reference exists.
  10. R10: Create reply rejects non-existent post reference.
  11. R11: Update reply rejects invalid body.
  12. R12: Subset search returns expected post/reply subsets.

How to interpret output: each test prints PASS or FAIL. The summary prints total passed/failed counts. A requirement is considered satisfied when its mapped test prints PASS and summary shows zero unexpected failures.

  • Constructor Details

    • HW2CrudValidationTest

      public HW2CrudValidationTest()

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Executes all built-in test cases in deterministic order.
      Parameters:
      args - command-line arguments (not used)

    • testCreatePostSuccess

      private static void testCreatePostSuccess(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T1 (maps to R1).

      Creates a valid post and verifies no error is returned. PASS means create behavior accepts valid student input.

    • testCreatePostDuplicateId

      private static void testCreatePostDuplicateId(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T2 (maps to R2).

      Attempts to create a post using an existing ID and verifies duplicate-ID rejection. PASS means uniqueness validation is enforced.

    • testCreatePostInvalidTitle

      private static void testCreatePostInvalidTitle(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T3 (maps to R3).

      Attempts to create a post with a blank title and verifies validation error. PASS means title-required validation is enforced.

    • testReadPostById

      private static void testReadPostById(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T4 (maps to R4).

      Reads an existing post by ID and verifies a non-null result. PASS means read-by-id behavior returns expected record.

    • testUpdatePostSuccess

      private static void testUpdatePostSuccess(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T5 (maps to R5).

      Updates an existing post and verifies resolved state and error-free update. PASS means update writes valid values to target post.

    • testUpdatePostMissing

      private static void testUpdatePostMissing(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T6 (maps to R6).

      Attempts update on a non-existent post ID and verifies missing-target message. PASS means update correctly rejects unknown IDs.

    • testDeletePostSuccess

      private static void testDeletePostSuccess(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T7 (maps to R7).

      Creates then deletes a post and verifies delete returns true. PASS means delete removes an existing record.

    • testDeletePostMissing

      private static void testDeletePostMissing(entityClasses.PostList postList)
      Test ID: T8 (maps to R8).

      Attempts delete on a non-existent ID and verifies return value is false. PASS means delete missing-target behavior is correct.

    • testCreateReplySuccess

      private static void testCreateReplySuccess(entityClasses.PostList postList, entityClasses.ReplyList replyList)
      Test ID: T9 (maps to R9).

      Creates a reply referencing an existing post and verifies no error. PASS means reply-create with valid post linkage is supported.

    • testCreateReplyInvalidPostReference

      private static void testCreateReplyInvalidPostReference(entityClasses.PostList postList, entityClasses.ReplyList replyList)
      Test ID: T10 (maps to R10).

      Attempts reply creation with an invalid post ID and verifies rejection. PASS means referential integrity is enforced for replies.

    • testUpdateReplyInvalidBody

      private static void testUpdateReplyInvalidBody(entityClasses.ReplyList replyList)
      Test ID: T11 (maps to R11).

      Attempts to update a reply with a blank body and verifies validation error. PASS means reply-body validation is enforced on update.

    • testSubsetSearch

      private static void testSubsetSearch(entityClasses.PostList postList, entityClasses.ReplyList replyList)
      Test ID: T12 (maps to R12).

      Builds subset views for posts/replies and verifies expected subset sizes. PASS means search/filter subset mechanics are functioning.

    • assertTrue

      private static void assertTrue(boolean condition, String testName, String failureDetails)
      Assertion helper used by all built-in tests.
      Parameters:
      condition - test condition to verify
      testName - display name of test case
      failureDetails - message shown on failure
